meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before Cheltenham Extra Places Juvenile Hurdle (GBB Race)

rankings.name: Scarlet Moon
key_positive_factors: Highest official rating (121) by a significant margin
Consistent hurdle form with multiple placings
Archie Watson yard is highly effective with juveniles
key_risks: Benjamin Poste has a lower strike rate than rival jockeys
Giving weight to all rivals except Cloaks Of Gold

rankings.name: Love You Back
key_positive_factors: Gary & Josh Moore yard is elite in juvenile hurdles
Strong runner-up efforts in both career starts
Caoilin Quinn is a talented and in-form jockey
key_risks: Officially rated 11lb inferior to the favorite
Has yet to show winning 'killer instinct' at the finish

rankings.name: Cloaks Of Gold
key_positive_factors: High-profile jockey booking in David Bass
Won on hurdles debut showing immediate aptitude
Progressive profile from a smaller but capable yard
key_risks: Step up in class from debut victory
Potential vulnerability on testing soft ground

rankings.name: Both Of Us
key_positive_factors: Kerry Lee stable excels with runners on soft ground
Unknown quantity making hurdles debut for respected connections
key_risks: Total lack of previous competitive experience
Market suggests others are more advanced at this stage

rankings.name: Forever Penywern
key_positive_factors: Warren Greatrex/James Bowen combination is high-quality
Likely to have learned from debut experience
key_risks: Beaten 23 lengths on only start to date
Form of debut run looks weak in this context

rankings.name: Jersey Tex
key_positive_factors: Stan Sheppard is a reliable pilot
key_risks: Eighth on debut and looks outclassed here
Stable strike rate is lower than main contenders

tricast_top_3.combination: Scarlet Moon > Love You Back > Cloaks Of Gold
Love You Back > Scarlet Moon > Cloaks Of Gold
Scarlet Moon > Cloaks Of Gold > Love You Back
